name: well_harness.demo_json_output.asset
description: Lightweight regression contract for well_harness demo --format json output. This is not a JSON Schema.

cases.prompt: logic4 和 throttle lock 有什么关系
required_evidence_fragments: blocked-state 解释 checkpoint gate 为什么未满足：logic4 explain@4.9s failed_conditions: deploy_90_percent_vdt。
diagnose_problem 解释下游 release 为什么在该窗口尚未发生
events@5.0s: deploy_90_percent_vdt False->True; logic4_active False->True; throttle_lock_release_cmd False->True
required_outcome_fragments: 4.9s checkpoint 时 logic4 仍被 deploy_90_percent_vdt 卡住
required_risk_fragments: bridge summary 只桥接 nominal-deploy 的现有 evidence

cases.prompt: 为什么 logic4 还没满足
required_evidence_fragments: blocked_status: name=deploy_90_percent_vdt source=explain_condition observed=False checkpoint=4.9s value=False required=True
events@5.0s: deploy_90_percent_vdt False->True; logic4_active False->True; throttle_lock_release_cmd False->True
required_risk_fragments: blocked-state comparison 只说明 nominal-deploy 中触发前最近一拍的 evidence 缺口

cases.prompt: 为什么 throttle lock 没释放
required_evidence_fragments: nominal-deploy: throttle_lock_release_cmd 随 logic4 在约 5.0s 从 0->1。
events@5.0s: deploy_90_percent_vdt False->True; logic4_active False->True; throttle_lock_release_cmd False->True
required_outcome_fragments: throttle lock 不是永久没释放
它约 5.0s 才随 logic4 释放
